response.justification: Strong software engineer with 19 years of broad technical experience and recent pivot into AI infrastructure, but lacks the deep demonstrated AI expertise and strategic platform-building track record required for a Principal Engineer role in AI Strategy. Recently started AI infrastructure work (April 2025) is promising but too nascent to establish the 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms' the role explicitly requires. Missing preferred advanced degree in AI-related field.
strengths: Extensive technical breadth with 19 years across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure engineering
Staff-level engineer demonstrating leadership through mentoring, workshops, and technical innovation in open-source projects
Recent role in AI infrastructure and MCP tooling shows strategic pivot toward AI ecosystem at appropriate organization
concerns: AI expertise is very recent (less than 2 months in current role) and narrowly focused on infrastructure tooling rather than strategic platform or product development
No advanced degree in AI-related field (role prefers Master's/PhD); holds only bachelor's in Computer Science
No demonstrated track record of building AI-powered products or platforms, or advising on AI strategy with customers and partners
